input: Hi team, I wanted to let everyone know that tomorrow's 10am standup is being pushed to 2pm because Sarah has a conflict with a client call. Please adjust your calendars accordingly and let me know if the new time doesn't work. Thanks!

Hello, I'm writing to follow up on the invoice I sent last week (invoice #4472 for $1,850). I haven't received payment yet and it's now 5 days overdue. Could you please let me know when I can expect payment? If there's an issue with the invoice, I'm happy to discuss.

Hey Mark, great meeting you at the conference yesterday! I really enjoyed our conversation about distributed systems. I'd love to grab coffee sometime next week to continue the discussion and hear more about what your team is building. Are you free Tuesday or Thursday afternoon?

Dear customer, Your subscription to ProDesign Pro will automatically renew on November 15th for $299. If you'd like to cancel or change your plan, please do so before November 14th through your account settings. Thank you for being a valued customer.

Team, After reviewing Q3 numbers, I'm pleased to announce we exceeded our revenue target by 18%. Great work everyone! We'll be celebrating with a team dinner on Friday at 7pm at Bistro 123. Please RSVP by Wednesday so I can finalize the reservation.

Hi Jennifer, I regret to inform you that we have decided to move forward with another candidate for the Senior Designer position. Your portfolio was impressive and the interview went well, but we ultimately chose someone whose experience more closely matched our specific needs. We wish you the best in your job search.
